name: DoIP_AddCombinedPDU
title: DoIP_AddCombinedPDU
syntax: long DoIP_AddCombinedPDU(dword payloadType, byte payload[], dword payloadLen);
description: Append another well-formed PDU to the PDU combination buffer for later sending with DoIP_SendPDUCombination. The currently configured protocol version byte will be used for the PDU.

parameters.name: payloadType
parameters.description: [0; 0xFFFF] type to send, i.e. this can be any value.

return: -10: Invalid parameter: the payload type or PDU given is too large.
